title: HONG HEH PIH NA LAM DANG

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hehpihna’n hong kidawm sak a, Launa teng bei sak hi,
Ka upcil a kipanin ah, manpha ka sa

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Launa gim na dah na sung pan, hong pai suak pih zo hi.
Tu ciang dong zawhpih tawn tung, inn

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Van ah kum tul kum then om , ni bang bang ih tang ding hi,
Pasian phatna a cil sang in, nuamzaw
